special offer
Persistence Crossbow's Soul

The soul owner shoots bolts at 3 random enemy units (preferred target: mages) every 4 sec. The bolts deal pure damage equal to 200% of the soul owner's attack. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The targets also have a {useChance:3} chance to get stunned for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
